page_content:
Credit Only Granted for: CINE319M or CINE310.

Formerly: CINE319M.

CINE311 Documentary Film (3 Credits)

A survey of currents in the history of the documentary film, beginning with early cinema and continuing through to more recent manifestations. Prerequisite: ENGL245, FILM245, or CINE245; or permission of ARHU- College of Arts & Humanities.
